The trainer-loop optimized candidate for `researcher.agent.md`. This candidate adds: a fixed 6-step evidence reading order, MCP fallback handling (record in `unresolved_gaps` and proceed with free-form discovery), partial-approval classification (approved / conditional / rejected), workspace artifact path guidance (`research/research-brief.json` under active iteration directory), and a structured JSON output format with all four eval fields and a `stop_recommendation` contract.
